description: FGAP-014 fix — migrate completeTask to the verification_verifies_item edge (per FGAP-014). completeTask (context-sdk.ts) currently reads verification.target/target_type, removed by c08f93b for the edge and never migrated, so it is unusable on any catalog substrate. Rewrite as a pure edge-gate: find verification (exists), assert status===passed, find task (exists, not completed/cancelled), ASSERT a verification_verifies_item edge (parent=verificationId, child=taskId) via findReferencesInRepo/walkAncestorsByLens (throw a clear edge-absent error if missing), set task status:completed via updateItemInBlock (DROP the verification field embed — the edge is the linkage), thread ctx for attestation. complete-task op: add ctx to run() + thread. Rewrite the 12-test suite to the edge-based flow (schema-valid verifications, no smuggled target/target_type; file the edge via appendRelationByRef; wrong-task -> no-edge; drop wrong-type; add a no-edge-bypass case). Full completion sequence; coding subagent; orchestrator runs all npm + sole git writer + re-audit. Closes FGAP-014.
acceptance_criteria: completeTask gates on a verification_verifies_item edge (parent=verification, child=task) + status===passed; no read of target/target_type
a passing verification with NO edge -> throws the edge-absent error (the FGAP-014 real-substrate scenario)
task set to completed without the verification field embed; ctx-attested
test suite rewritten to schema-valid verifications + real appendRelationByRef edges (no field smuggling); drop the wrong-type test; add the no-edge-bypass case
runtime demo on a real/throwaway substrate: complete-task completes with edge+passed, throws without edge; context-validate completed-task-has-verification invariant still passes
fresh adversarial audit: gate cannot be bypassed; result cap-bounded; no regression
FGAP-014 closed with the 4 closure fields
